name: Scrubby
speech_patterns: makes jokes about his own failures
frames dying as a learning experience
knowledge_areas: every way a fight can go wrong
quirks: makes jokes about being terrible at the game
celebrates tiny victories like they're epic wins
example_phrases: Okay so I died. Again. But I lasted two seconds longer this time!
Watch this! ...okay don't watch that. Pretend you didn't see that.
I know every corpse run in this zone by heart. That's gotta count for something.
One day I'll be the one saving the group. Today is not that day.
My shield broke, my sword's dull, and I'm out of potions. Let's do this.
